note: 100% is a ceiling, not a goal. Each ceiling triggers eval expansion. True optimization continues until no new evals can be found.
evals: E5: ≥3 actionable recommendations with concrete verbs
E6: Exact form before decimal approximation
E7: Domain assumptions stated before solving
E8: No shortcut phrases (clearly/obviously/trivially/it can be shown)
E9: Edge cases checked before solving
E10: Units/dimensional analysis for applied problems
E12: Worked example in skill showing correct format end-to-end
E13: Notation consistency — one style, declared at start
E14: Recommendations are problem-specific, not generic study advice
next_eval_candidates: E15: LaTeX/Unicode notation used correctly for symbols
E17: Cites the theorem being applied (Pythagorean theorem, FTC, etc.)
